data.name: Yua Games collection
data.detailed_description:
a collection of adult games by Yua Nizu(me)

Hentai School

a point and click adult horror fully of many secrets and easter eggs

Hentai School life

a spin off to the prior game continuing its story and themes in the form of an RPG with skills similar to those found in MMOs such as different crafting skills

Kinky Crawler

a first person rouge-lite dungeon crawler were you gather gold and servants to build your estate

Breeding Mainia

a simple incremental game about passing on traits via breeding

Breeding Mania 2

takes elements from the prior game and uses them in factory building and automation

Stress & Sex

another dungeon crawler but is instead fully turn based and has no persistent progression

Stress & Sex

a Vpet style game with 6 different paths for your girl to grow into

data.short_description: a collection of adult games by Yua Nizu(me), containing a wide range of game-play and themes across every game. you have dungeon crawling, factory building, point and click, Vpet, and more.
data.reviews:
“Thank you for turning a game about rape into a game of horror, I love the fact the rapist dies at the end of the game as a consequence for its actions. (stab the female in the store and have the apple fall on the other female's head to see what im talking about)”
5/5 – StrictSanic

“This may make me quite porn I'm going to go become a monk or something”
5/5 – Tastesofedge

“the rpg aspect is good, the thief system is too ez to lvl up i can just spam cheap fabric and then i am god of thief, the houshou marine pirate skirt easter egg is nice, me can be the god of love make man cum from dirty talk, the crafting is gud but need introduction, gains are useless me find nothing to use with it. The game just need a world to explore and sum visual indicator. The game is gud :3”
3.5/5 – Dannyanh123
